---
title: "Find A Gene Project"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(bio3d)

aln <- read.fasta("dynamin_alignment.fasta")

id <- seqidentity(aln)

id_matrix <- as.matrix(id)

heatmap(id_matrix,
        symm = TRUE,
        margins = c(8,8),
        col = colorRampPalette(c("yellow","darkorange","red"))(50))

```

```{r}
apply(id_matrix, 1, mean)
```

```{r}
library(bio3d)

hits <- blast.pdb(aln)

```

```{r}
head(hits)
```

```{r}
library(bio3d)
pdb.annotate("5A3F_A")
```
